name: Yee Hop Holdings Limited
summary: Yee Hop Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides engineering and construction services for private and public sectors in Hong Kong, the People's Republic of China, and the Philippines. It operates through Foundation and Other Civil Works; Tunneling Works; and Breeding, Sales and Trading of Aquatic Products segments. Its foundation works include construction of mini-piles, rock-socketed steel H-piles, and driven steel H piles, as well as other civil works, such as site formation works, and road and pavement works; and tunneling works comprise pipe jacking, hand dig tunnel, and cut-and-cover tunnel works. The company is also involved in the research and development, breeding, sale, and trading of aquatic products; and provision of laboratory test services. Yee Hop Holdings Limited was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Kowloon Bay, Hong Kong.
